description:
What: When D2's DPS callsite allocates a VecI64, route through alloc_owned instead of Cheney. End-to-end demonstration: Cheney scans RC roots (B4), RC drops at checkpoint (B2), no leaks under stress.

Why: Proves the hybrid GC works before any FBIP rewrites depend on it.

CLIF impact: caller's alloc site swaps alloc_vec_i64 -> alloc_owned_vec_i64. Same instruction count.

Removes: nothing.

Tests: integration test combining D2 + B-arc; long-running stress with mixed arena traffic.
title: fz-dps.B5: VecI64 cross-arena demonstration
